name: Premium Silicone Case – iPhone 15
description: Military-grade drop protection with a soft-touch matte finish. Precise cutouts, wireless charging compatible.

name: Clear Armor Case – Samsung S24
description: Crystal-clear TPU hard case. Anti-yellowing technology, raised bezels for screen and camera protection.

name: Tempered Glass Guard – Universal
description: 9H hardness tempered glass with oleophobic coating. 99.9% clarity, full glue for edge-to-edge protection.

name: Privacy Screen Guard – iPhone 14
description: Anti-spy privacy filter with 9H hardness. Blocks side-view visibility, protects your data in public.

name: 65W GaN Fast Charger
description: Gallium Nitride technology. Charges your phone 0-100% in under 45 minutes. Multi-device compatible.

name: 20W USB-C PD Charger
description: Power Delivery 3.0 fast charging. Compact travel-friendly design, universal compatibility.

name: Pro Bass Wireless Earbuds
description: Active Noise Cancellation, 30hr battery life, IPX5 water resistant. Immersive bass with crystal highs.

name: TWS Lite Earbuds
description: True wireless stereo, 20hr total battery. Touch controls, voice assistant support, ergonomic fit.

name: Carbon Fiber Skin – Samsung S23
description: Premium 3M vinyl skin. Bubble-free application, residue-free removal. Precise laser-cut fit.

name: Marble Texture Skin – Universal
description: Elegant marble pattern vinyl wrap. Scratch-resistant, ultra-thin 0.2mm profile, easy DIY application.

name: 5000mAh Li-ion Battery – Redmi
description: OEM-grade lithium-ion replacement battery. CE & RoHS certified. Includes installation toolkit.

name: 4000mAh Battery – Samsung J-Series
description: High-capacity replacement battery with 500+ charge cycle life. Zero memory effect, safe chemistry.
